task_completion.description: Verify the configuration scope is set to 'Main Website'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Store View' or 'Scope' dropdown at the top left of the Magento configuration page is set to 'Main Website'.

task_completion.description: Verify Table Rate Shipping is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Table Rates configuration section, the 'Enable' dropdown is set to 'Yes' (the 'Use system value' checkbox may need to be unchecked).

task_completion.description: Verify the Title is set to 'Heavy Goods Shipping'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' text field in the Table Rates section contains exactly 'Heavy Goods Shipping'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Condition is set to 'Weight vs. Destination'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Condition' dropdown in the Table Rates section is set to 'Weight vs. Destination'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent prepared a CSV file with the correct shipping rates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or spreadsheet application showing CSV data being created or edited. Look for rows containing the values 'US', '*', '*', '0', '15' (or 15.00) and 'US', '*', '*', '10', '25' (or 25.00).

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file was imported and the configuration was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Import' file input field in the Table Rates section shows a file has been selected, and/or a green success message 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Magento Admin panel loaded in a web browser, indicating genuine GUI interaction rather than direct database or API manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually created or constructed the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or formatting the CSV content in an editor or terminal, rather than magically producing a pre-existing file without showing its creation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page layout, fonts, and styling look like standard Magento Admin without signs of DOM manipulation (e.g., browser dev tools are not open to modify HTML elements).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Magento 2.4.7 Table Rate Shipping uses the internal condition code 'package_weight' for the 'Weight vs. Destination' setting. The required rates to be imported via CSV are: Country 'US', Region '*' (or blank), Zip '*' (or blank), Weight '0', Price '15.00' AND Country 'US', Region '*' (or blank), Zip '*' (or blank), Weight '10', Price '25.00'. The 'Import' field only appears when the configuration scope is changed from 'Default Config' to a specific website (e.g., 'Main Website').
